features.name: App Infrastructure & Logging
features.description: Handles application startup, crash/hang logging, system tray icon with notification badge counter, balloon notifications, structured app logging with rotation, safe background file writes, and global constants.

features.name: Feature Context Resolution
features.description: Resolves which features are relevant to a given task description using hybrid keyword+vector search, then builds a context block for prompt injection. Also handles post-completion feature updates.

features.name: Feature Registry
features.description: Maintains a persistent registry of codebase features with signatures, keywords, dependencies, and module membership. Provides feature lookup by task description or symbol name and builds context blocks for prompt injection.

features.name: Feature Update Agent
features.description: Post-completion fire-and-forget agent that uses Haiku to update the feature registry based on what a completed task changed. Keeps the registry current without blocking the task lifecycle.

features.name: Task History & Persistence
features.description: Persists completed tasks to disk, loads history on startup, cleans up entries beyond retention period, and saves/restores the active task queue across app restarts.

features.name: LLM Services (Claude & Gemini)
features.description: Provides streaming and non-streaming chat interfaces to Claude (Anthropic) and Gemini (Google) APIs, including API key management, usage tracking, model selection, image generation, and structured JSON outputs via SendStructuredHaikuAsync method.

features.name: Main Window & UI Composition
features.description: The composition root of the WPF application: wires all managers, handles UI events, manages layout and panels, and coordinates top-level workflows. MainWindow.xaml was refactored to split large XAML templates into separate ResourceDictionary files in Controls/Templates/ for improved startup parse time and maintainability.

features.name: MCP Server Integration
features.description: Manages MCP-for-Unity server connections: checks if the server process is running, monitors health with auto-restart, and manages per-project connection state. Automatically enables MCP when auto-mode is disabled in a game project.

features.name: Task Output Management
features.description: Creates and manages per-task output tabs in the UI, handles ANSI-stripped streaming output rendering, supports Gemini image galleries, manages overflow when output exceeds the cap, and provides follow-up output injection.

features.name: Output Processing & Subtask Extraction
features.description: Processes raw Claude CLI output to extract subtasks, team members, and inject child outputs back into parent tasks. Handles token limit errors and model-switching on retry.

features.name: Preprocessor Skip Rules for Task Types
Project Management
features.description: Manages the set of active projects: metadata, per-project rules and instructions, display descriptions, color assignments, crash/log paths, and game-project detection. Acts as the primary source of project configuration consumed by tasks and prompts.

features.name: Prompt Building & Context Assembly
features.description: Assembles full AI prompts from modular blocks: system instructions, project rules, MCP configuration, feature context, skills, and user input. Also handles context reduction for token-limit retries and deduplication of repeated context.

features.name: Semantic & Hybrid Search
features.description: Provides vector-based semantic search over features, source file chunks, and task history using Voyage AI embeddings stored in SQLite. Combines vector similarity, keyword scoring, symbol matching, and task history for hybrid relevance ranking.

features.name: Task Execution Engine
features.description: Launches, monitors, and manages the full execution lifecycle of AI tasks with proper state machine transitions: building Claude CLI commands, handling process I/O, managing pause/resume/cancel, auto-commit, subtask injection, and token limit retries. Ensures tasks transition from Queued to Stored (executing) status when actually running.

features.name: Task History & Group Tracking
features.description: Persists completed task history, active queue snapshots, and aggregated task group states. Enables session recovery and historical reporting.

features.name: Task Orchestration & DAG
features.description: Manages a directed acyclic graph (DAG) of task dependencies, ensuring tasks are started only when all their dependencies have resolved. Properly transitions queued tasks to running status when unblocked. Fires TaskReady events and detects dependency cycles.

features.name: Task Preprocessing & Flag Inference
features.description: Sends a task description to Claude Haiku before execution to infer optimal flags (feature mode, auto-decompose, spawn team, apply fix, MCP, extended planning). Applies inferred flags to the AgentTask without overriding user-set values.

features.name: Task UI & Graph Visualization
features.description: Renders task cards, output tabs with live streaming, task dependency graph, and workflow composer. Provides the primary user-facing task management interface.

features.name: Integrated Terminal
features.description: Embeds a real ConPTY-backed terminal within the application supporting multiple named tabs, full VT100 emulation, command history, working directory tracking, keyboard input handling (arrow keys, Enter, and other keypresses forwarded to the active process), and Ctrl+C interrupt.

features.name: Tray Icon Task Completion Badge
features.description:
New feature identified from task: Add a notification badge counter to the tray icon that displays the count of finished tasks while the app is not focused. The badge should:
- Display in the top-right corner of the icon
- Show the count inside a circle
- Cap the counter at 99 (show "99" if exceeded)
- Clear/hide the badge when the app is focused (activated)
- Increment when tasks finish and the app is not focused
- Be properly rendered on the tray icon visual
